nasb.text: But it came about at the end of three years, that two of the servants of Shimei ran away to Achish son of Maacah, king of Gath. And they told Shimei, saying, “Behold, your servants are in Gath.”

esv.text: But it happened at the end of three years that two of Shimei’s servants ran away to Achish, son of Maacah, king of Gath. And when it was told Shimei, “Behold, your servants are in Gath,”

cnv.text: 三年以後，示每的兩個僕人逃到迦特王瑪迦的兒子亞吉那裡。有人告訴示每說：“你的僕人在迦特。”

ccb.text: 过了三年，示每的两个仆人逃到迦特王玛迦的儿子亚吉那里。示每知道后，
